title: Elderflower Muffin Delight
description: A moist and flavorful muffin infused with the delicate taste of elderflower. Perfect for a delightful breakfast treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
In a large bowl, whisk together the dried elderflower.
Add the store-bought muffins to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the elderflower mixture.
Spoon the muffin mixture into the prepared muffin tin.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown.
Let the muffins cool in the pan for 5 minutes, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.
